_comment: Phase 1: Daily LinkedIn job digest via WhatsApp only

action.message: Run the daily LinkedIn Easy Apply job digest for Islahuddin. Search LinkedIn for: 'full stack developer remote', 'node.js developer remote', 'MERN stack developer remote', 'react developer remote'. Filter: Easy Apply only, posted within last 24 hours, remote. Show top 5-8 jobs with: job title, company name, salary (if shown), and apply link. Number each job [1], [2], etc. End the message with: 'Reply apply [number] to apply to a specific job, or apply all to apply to all of them.'

Give Islahuddin a weekly LinkedIn job application summary. Read data/applications_log.json and report: total applications this week, which companies were applied to, and how many succeeded vs failed. If fewer than 10 applications were made this week, suggest running a new job search.
